description_long: This object is a hand tool with a flat, triangular metal blade and a dark, rounded handle. The blade is wide at the tip and tapers toward the handle, with a slightly rough, mottled texture suggesting it is made of steel or iron. The handle appears to be made of wood or a dense synthetic material, smoothly contoured for grip and comfort. The transition between the blade and handle is marked by a small metal collar or ferrule. The tool is compact and lightweight, suitable for scraping, spreading, or prying tasks. No visible brand markings, mounting holes, or signs of wear are present.
description: A compact hand tool with a flat, triangular metal blade and a dark, rounded handle, designed for scraping or spreading tasks.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the tool, highlighting the flat, triangular blade and rounded handle.
description_view_1: End-on view from the handle, showing the handle's rounded shape and the blade's thin profile.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with the blade and handle clearly visible.
description_view_3: Blade-facing view, showing the wide, flat surface of the blade and the handle behind it.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, rounded handle made of dark wood or synthetic material, smoothly contoured with no visible grip texture or end cap.
attribute_blade_type: Flat, triangular blade with a straight edge and wide tip, made of metal with a slightly rough surface.
